effect.zh: 將造成傷害的一半轉化為自己的HP來回復。
effect.en: Restores the user's HP by half the damage taken by the target.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 將自己和對手的『攻擊』和『特攻』相加後平分。
effect.en: The user and the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are added together and averaged.

effect.zh: 將自己的『攻擊』和『防禦』互換。『能力階級』不會改變。
effect.en: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats. Stat stage changes are not swapped.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 將自己與對手的『攻擊』和『特攻』能力階級互換。
effect.en: The user swaps its Attack and Sp. Atk stat stage changes with the target.

effect.zh: 將自己的『攻擊』和『防禦』互換。『能力階級』不會改變。
effect.en: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats. Stat stage changes are not swapped.

effect.zh: 不會受到對手的『守住』、『看穿』、『掀榻榻米』、『碉堡』、『王者盾牌』、『尖刺防守』、『攔堵』、『線阱』和『火焰防守』等狀態的影響。
effect.en: Bypasses the effects of Protect, Detect, Mat Block, Baneful Bunker, King's Shield, Spiky Shield, Obstruct, Silk Trap, and Burning Bulwark.

effect.zh: 自己的『體重』比對手越重，威力越大。對手體重不到自己的1/5則威力為120，1/4為100，1/3為80，1/2為60，以上為40。如果對手使用了『變小』，則必定命中且威力翻倍。對極巨化對手無效。
effect.en: The heavier the user is compared to the target, the greater the move's power. Power is 120 if target is 1/5 the user's weight or less, 100 if 1/4 or less, 80 if 1/3 or less, 60 if 1/2 or less, and 40 otherwise. Always hits and doubles power if target used Minimize. Fails against Dynamaxed targets.

effect.zh: 5回合內，讓對手的特殊攻擊傷害減半。如果我方有多隻寶可夢，則傷害減為2/3。被擊中要害時不會減傷。替換寶可夢效果仍然持續。
effect.en: For 5 turns, halves damage taken from opposing Special attacks. If there are multiple allies, damage is reduced to 2/3 instead of half. Does not reduce critical hit damage. The effect remains even if the user switches out.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，讓對手的場地陷入『撒菱』狀態。
effect.en: After attacking, sets Spikes on the target's side of the field.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 將對手所有的能力階級升降顛倒。
effect.en: Reverses all of the target's stat stage changes.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。當對手陷入異常狀態時，威力提升為2倍。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. Power doubles if the target has a status condition.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『攻擊』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手畏縮。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手畏縮。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

effect.zh: 讓自己的『攻擊』和『防禦』各提升1級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+3），在該回合內，自己和同伴不會受到對手先制攻擊招式的傷害。也不會受到因特性效果導致的先制攻擊傷害。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +3). Protects the user and its allies from priority moves, including those granted by abilities, for that turn.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+1）。如果該回合對手選擇的不是攻擊招式，或者因為優先度等關係對手已經結束攻擊，則招式會失敗。即使對手處於『睡眠』或『冰凍』狀態，只要選擇了攻擊招式就能成功。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +1). Fails if the target is not using an attack move, or if the target has already moved due to priority differences. Succeeds even if the target is Asleep or Frozen, as long as it selected an attack.

effect.zh: 在自己離場之前，對手寶可夢將無法使用與自己所學會的相同招式。
effect.en: As long as the user remains in battle, opponents cannot use any moves known by the user.

effect.zh: 在下回合結束前，所有非『幽靈』屬性的寶可夢都無法逃跑或替換。
effect.en: Prevents all non-Ghost-type Pokémon from fleeing or switching out until the end of the next turn.

effect.zh: 有50%的機率讓對手陷入『中毒』、『麻痺』或『睡眠』狀態之一。
effect.en: Has a 50% chance to Poison, Paralyze, or put the target to Sleep.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+2）。如果對手使用了『守住』、『看穿』、『掀榻榻米』、『碉堡』、『王者盾牌』、『尖刺防守』、『攔堵』、『線阱』、『火焰防守』、『快防』或『廣防』，能解除其效果並進行攻擊（未使用的情況下為一般攻擊）。『極巨防壁』無法被解除，但能貫穿傷害。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +2). Bypasses and breaks the effects of Protect, Detect, Mat Block, Baneful Bunker, King's Shield, Spiky Shield, Obstruct, Silk Trap, Burning Bulwark, Quick Guard, and Wide Guard. Bypasses Max Guard but does not break it.

effect.zh: 讓對手的『攻擊』降低2級。
effect.en: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 根據自己『攻擊』或『特攻』中較高的數值來計算傷害。此外，攻擊時不會受到對手特性的影響。
effect.en: Calculates damage using the user's Attack or Sp. Atk stat, whichever is higher. Also ignores the target's ability when attacking.

effect.zh: 必定後制攻擊（優先度:-6）。強制對手替換寶可夢。若是野生寶可夢則結束戰鬥。無視自己的命中率和對手的閃避率，必定命中。不受對手『守住』、『看穿』、『碉堡』、『尖刺防守』、『攔堵』、『線阱』和『火焰防守』的影響。貫穿對手的『替身』狀態。對極巨化對手無效。如果是野生寶可夢，若對手等級比自己高則招式失敗。
effect.en: Always goes last (Priority: -6). Forces the target to switch out. Ends the battle if facing a wild Pokémon. Always hits regardless of Accuracy or Evasion. Bypasses Protect, Detect, Baneful Bunker, Spiky Shield, Obstruct, Silk Trap, and Burning Bulwark. Bypasses Substitutes. Fails against Dynamaxed targets. Fails against wild Pokémon of a higher level.

effect.zh: 根據隊伍中包含自己在內，未陷入『瀕死』或異常狀態的寶可夢數量來決定攻擊次數。
effect.en: Hits once for each conscious, non-statused Pokémon in the user's party.

effect.zh: 讓攜帶道具的寶可夢變成未攜帶道具的狀態。
effect.en: Removes the held items of all other Pokémon on the field.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『冰凍』狀態。當天氣為『下雪』時必定命中。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to Freeze the target. Always hits if the weather is Snow.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手畏縮。如果對手使用了『變小』，則必定命中且威力翻倍。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Always hits and doubles in power if the target used Minimize.

effect.zh: 此招式同時具有『格鬥』屬性和『飛行』屬性。如果對手使用了『變小』，則必定命中且威力翻倍。
effect.en: This move deals Fighting and Flying-type damage simultaneously. Always hits and doubles in power if the target used Minimize.

effect.zh: 讓對手陷入1～4回合的『混亂』狀態。
effect.en: Confuses all other Pokémon on the field for 1 to 4 turns.

effect.zh: 對手回復最大HP的一半。但在『青草場地』時，回復最大HP的2/3。（在雙打對戰中對同伴使用較佳）
effect.en: Restores up to half of the target's maximum HP. Restores up to 2/3 of maximum HP instead if Grassy Terrain is active. (Best used on an ally in Double Battles)

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『冰凍』狀態。此招式對『水』屬性寶可夢也有效果絕佳的判定。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to Freeze the target. This move is super effective on Water-type Pokémon.

effect.zh: 第一回合不進行攻擊，在第二回合發動攻擊。有30%的機率讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。
effect.en: Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second. Has a 30% chance to Paralyze the target.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己的『特攻』降低2級。
effect.en: After attacking, the user's Sp. Atk is lowered by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 讓自己的『攻擊』和『特攻』各提升1級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓自己的『特攻』提升1級。屬於聲音招式。能貫穿對手的『替身』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage. Sound-based move. Bypasses Substitutes.

effect.zh: 自己也會受到給予對手傷害33%的損傷。有10%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。即使自己處於『冰凍』狀態也能使用，使用後會解除『冰凍』狀態。
effect.en: The user takes 33% of the damage dealt in recoil. Has a 10% chance to burn the target. Can be used while Frozen, and thaws the user.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

effect.zh: 自己的HP越少，招式威力越低。威力為（150×自己剩餘HP÷自己最大HP）。
effect.en: The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power. Power is equal to (150 × current HP ÷ max HP).

effect.zh: 每受到1次攻擊，威力就會提升50（最大威力350）。即使回到同行寶可夢中也不會重置。當特性為『鐵拳』時，威力提升為1.2倍。
effect.en: Power increases by 50 for each time the user has been hit (up to a maximum of 350). Does not reset upon switching out. Power is increased by 1.2x if the user has the Iron Fist ability.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己的『速度』、『防禦』和『特防』各降低1級。
effect.en: After attacking, the user's Speed, Defense, and Sp. Def stats are lowered by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 將對手最後使用的招式PP減少3。屬於聲音招式。能貫穿對手的『替身』狀態。
effect.en: Reduces the PP of the target's last used move by 3. Sound-based move. Bypasses Substitutes.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己的『防禦』和『特防』各降低1級。當特性為『鐵拳』時，威力提升為1.2倍。
effect.en: After attacking, the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats are lowered by 1 stage each. Power is increased by 1.2x if the user has the Iron Fist ability.

effect.zh: 使用後的下一回合將無法行動。
effect.en: The user cannot move on the next turn.

effect.zh: 這個招式無法連續使用2次。
effect.en: This move cannot be used twice in a row.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 有50%的機率讓對手的『防禦』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。容易擊中要害（要害等級:+1）。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to burn the target. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

effect.zh: 治癒自身的異常狀態。自身的『特攻』和『特防』各提升1級。
effect.en: Cures the user's status conditions. Raises the user's Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 自身會承受對手所受傷害的33%。
effect.en: The user receives recoil damage equal to 33% of the damage dealt to the target.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 使用後的下一回合將無法行動。
effect.en: The user cannot move on the next turn.

effect.zh: 有40%機率威力為40，30%機率威力為80，10%機率威力為120，20%機率會讓對手回復最大HP的1/4。
effect.en: Has a 40% chance of 40 power, 30% chance of 80 power, 10% chance of 120 power, and 20% chance to heal the target for 1/4 of its max HP.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『中毒』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手陷入『中毒』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手陷入『中毒』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

effect.zh: 自身的『體重』比對手越重，威力越高。若對手體重為自身1/5以下則威力120，1/4以下為100，1/3以下為80，1/2以下為60，更大則為40。若對手使用了『變小』，則必定命中且威力加倍（第七世代起）。對極巨化對手無效。
effect.en: Power is higher the heavier the user is than the target. Power is 120 if the target is 1/5 the user's weight or less, 100 if 1/4 or less, 80 if 1/3 or less, 60 if 1/2 or less, and 40 if more. If the target has used Minimize, this move bypasses accuracy checks and deals double damage (Gen 7+). Fails against Dynamaxed targets.

effect.zh: 讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。對『電』屬性無效。
effect.en: Paralyzes the target. Does not affect Electric-type Pokémon.

effect.zh: 暫時變成和對手相同的編號、外型、能力值、個體值、能力等級、特性及招式。但HP、攜帶物品、異常狀態等不會被複製，招式的PP全部變為5。替換下場後會恢復原狀。複製極巨化對手時，會變成該寶可夢原本的樣子。
effect.en: The user transforms into the target, copying its species, appearance, stats, IVs, stat changes, Ability, and moves. HP, held item, and status conditions are not copied. The PP of all copied moves is set to 5. Reverts upon switching out. If targeting a Dynamaxed Pokémon, the user copies its base form.

effect.zh: 當對手處於『中毒』狀態時，威力加倍。
effect.en: Power is doubled if the target is poisoned.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自身的『速度』降低2級。
effect.en: After attacking, the user's Speed is lowered by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

effect.zh: 給予在該回合最後攻擊自己的對手，所受傷害1.5倍的傷害。如果沒有受到傷害則會失敗。不受屬性相剋影響。
effect.en: Deals damage equal to 1.5x the damage last received during the turn to the opponent that inflicted it. Fails if no damage was received. Not affected by type matchups.

effect.zh: 必定後制（優先度:-6）。強制讓對手的寶可夢替換下場。如果是野生寶可夢，則結束戰鬥。無視自身的命中率和對手的迴避率必定命中。不受對手的『守住』、『看穿』、『碉堡』、『尖刺防守』、『攔堵』、『線阱』和『火焰防守』影響。聲音招式。可穿透對手的『替身』狀態。對極巨化對手無效。面對野生寶可夢時，若對手等級比自身高則會失敗。
effect.en: Always goes last (Priority: -6). Forces the target to switch out. Ends wild battles. Never misses. Bypasses Protect, Detect, Baneful Bunker, Spiky Shield, Obstruct, Silk Trap, and Burning Bulwark. Sound-based move. Bypasses Substitutes. Fails against Dynamaxed targets. In wild battles, fails if the target's level is higher than the user's.

effect.zh: 立即食用自己攜帶的『樹果』並觸發效果，同時讓自身的『防禦』提升2級。
effect.en: The user instantly consumes its held Berry, activating its effect, and sharply raises its Defense by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 奪取對手攜帶的物品變為己有。如果自身已經攜帶物品則會失敗，但若自身的物品被『拍落』無效化時仍可奪取並覆蓋。在訓練家對戰中，戰鬥結束後物品會消失。
effect.en: Steals the target's held item. Fails if the user already holds an item, but can still steal and overwrite if the user's item was knocked off. In Trainer battles, the stolen item is lost after the battle.

effect.zh: 自身的『特攻』提升3級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 3 stages.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

effect.zh: 在4～5回合內，每回合結束時給予對手最大HP 1/8的傷害，期間非『幽靈』屬性的對手無法逃走或替換。
effect.en: Traps the target for 4-5 turns, dealing damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP at the end of each turn. Non-Ghost-type targets cannot flee or switch out.

effect.zh: 各有10%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態，或是讓對手畏縮。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.

effect.zh: 在雙打對戰中，若與『草之誓約』組合使用，會在4回合內每回合對『火』屬性以外的對手造成傷害；若與『水之誓約』組合使用，會在4回合內讓招式追加效果更容易出現。組合時威力變為150。
effect.en: In Double Battles, if combined with Grass Pledge, damages non-Fire-type opponents every turn for 4 turns. If combined with Water Pledge, doubles the chance of secondary effects for 4 turns. Base power becomes 150 when combined.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。當特性為『鐵拳』時，威力提升為1.2倍。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to burn the target. Power is increased by 1.2x if the user has the Iron Fist ability.

effect.zh: 有50%的機率讓自身的『特攻』提升1級。
effect.en: Has a 50% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『防禦』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 3回合結束後，在場包含自己在內的所有寶可夢都會陷入『瀕死』狀態。如果在發作前替換下場則效果消失。聲音招式。可穿透對手的『替身』狀態。
effect.en: Any Pokémon that hears this song faints in 3 turns. The effect vanishes if the Pokémon switches out. Sound-based move. Bypasses Substitutes.

effect.zh: 1回合內連續攻擊2～5次。
effect.en: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

effect.zh: 自身的『防禦』和『特防』各提升1級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手在2～5回合內陷入『混亂』狀態。當天氣為『下雨』時必定命中，為『大晴天』時命中率變為50%。對手正在使用『飛翔』、『彈跳』、『自由落體』時也能命中。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. Never misses in Rain. Accuracy drops to 50% in harsh sunlight. Can hit targets in the semi-invulnerable turn of Fly, Bounce, and Sky Drop.

effect.zh: 不使用『攻擊』，而是用自身的『防禦』和『防禦』能力等級代替『攻擊』數值來計算傷害。
effect.en: Uses the user's Defense stat and stat modifications instead of Attack to calculate damage.

effect.zh: 自身會承受對手所受傷害的33%。有10%的機率讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。
effect.en: The user receives recoil damage equal to 33% of the damage dealt. Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，會與同行寶可夢替換。
effect.en: After attacking, the user switches out with another Pokémon in the party.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『中毒』狀態。容易擊中要害（要害等級:+1）。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to poison the target. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

effect.zh: 對手沒有攜帶物品時會失敗。此外，該招式沒有讓對手物品無效的效果。
effect.en: Fails if the target is not holding an item. Does not negate the item's effects.

effect.zh: 在4～5回合內，每回合結束時給予對手最大HP 1/8的傷害，期間非『幽靈』屬性的對手無法逃走或替換。
effect.en: Traps the target for 4-5 turns, dealing damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP at the end of each turn. Non-Ghost-type targets cannot flee or switch out.

effect.zh: 使用後，對手每次替換寶可夢時都會受到傷害。最多可使用3次，1次時給予對手最大HP 1/8的傷害，2次時1/6，3次時1/4。『飛行』屬性、特性『飄浮』的寶可夢不會受到傷害。
effect.en: Lays down spikes that damage opponents switching in. Can be used up to 3 times to deal 1/8, 1/6, or 1/4 of their max HP. Flying-types and Pokémon with Levitate are immune.

effect.zh: 在4～5回合內，每回合結束時給予對手最大HP 1/8的傷害，期間非『幽靈』屬性的對手無法逃走或替換。
effect.en: Traps the target for 4-5 turns, dealing damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP at the end of each turn. Non-Ghost-type targets cannot flee or switch out.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 無視自身的命中率和對手的迴避率必定命中。
effect.en: Never misses, bypassing accuracy and evasion modifiers.

effect.zh: 5回合內，場上所有寶可夢的攜帶物品效果都會失效。
effect.en: For 5 turns, the effects of all held items for all Pokémon are disabled.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『速度』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+1）。當特性為『鐵拳』時，威力提升為1.2倍。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +1). Power is increased by 1.2x if the user has the Iron Fist ability.

effect.zh: 在4～5回合內，每回合結束時給予對手最大HP 1/8的傷害，期間非『幽靈』屬性的對手無法逃走或替換。
effect.en: Traps the target for 4-5 turns, dealing damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP at the end of each turn. Non-Ghost-type targets cannot flee or switch out.

effect.zh: 施展對手最後使用的招式來攻擊。自己的招式也會成為對象。如果最後的招式是極巨招式，則會使用其原本的招式。
effect.en: The user copies the move last used by any Pokémon, including itself. If the last move was a Max Move, the original move is used.

effect.zh: 將對手變成『超能力』屬性。對『草』屬性、擁有特性『防塵』或攜帶道具『防塵護目鏡』的寶可夢無效。
effect.en: Changes the target's type to Psychic. This move has no effect on Grass-type Pokémon, Pokémon with the Overcoat ability, or Pokémon holding Safety Goggles.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+4），在該回合內不受對手的招式攻擊。連續使用容易失敗。具體來說，第一次會成功，但每次使用的成功率會變成原來的1/3（失敗則重置）。極巨招式或第7世代Z招式的攻擊招式會穿透，並受到1/4的傷害。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +4) and protects the user from all attacks for that turn. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession (success rate drops to 1/3 each use, resetting on failure). Max Moves and Gen 7 Z-Moves bypass Protect and deal 1/4 of their normal damage.

effect.zh: 讓自己的『防禦』提升1級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Defense by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 自己和己方全體的HP各回復最大HP的1/4，並且治癒異常狀態。
effect.en: Restores the user's and all allies' HP by 1/4 of their maximum HP and cures any status conditions.

effect.zh: 自己陷入『瀕死』，取而代之讓下一隻替換出場的己方寶可夢的異常狀態、HP和PP全部回復。（與『治癒之願』不同，PP也會回復）
effect.en: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP, PP, and status conditions fully restored. (Unlike 'Healing Wish', this also restores PP).

effect.zh: 減少自己最大HP的1/4來製造出一個具有相同HP的替身，在替身HP歸零前會代替自己承受所有攻擊。替身不會陷入異常狀態。但是，聲音類招式等仍會直接受到影響。可以防禦對手的極巨招式，但若自己進行極巨化，替身會消失。
effect.en: The user cuts 1/4 of its maximum HP to create a decoy that absorbs attacks until its HP drops to 0. The substitute prevents status conditions. However, sound-based moves bypass the substitute. It can protect against Max Moves, but if the user Dynamaxes, the substitute vanishes.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+4），在該回合內不受對手的招式攻擊。連續使用容易失敗。具體來說，第一次會成功，但每次使用的成功率會變成原來的1/3（失敗則重置）。極巨招式或第7世代Z招式的攻擊招式會穿透，並受到1/4的傷害。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +4) and protects the user from all attacks for that turn. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession (success rate drops to 1/3 each use, resetting on failure). Max Moves and Gen 7 Z-Moves bypass Protect and deal 1/4 of their normal damage.

effect.zh: 在1回合內連續攻擊2～5次。
effect.en: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己將陷入『瀕死』狀態。當場上處於『薄霧場地』狀態，且自己不是『飛行』屬性或擁有特性『飄浮』等、處於地面上時，威力提升為1.5倍。
effect.en: The user faints after attacking. If Misty Terrain is active and the user is grounded (not Flying-type or possessing the Levitate ability), the move's power increases by 1.5x.

effect.zh: 在5回合內，將場地狀態變為『薄霧場地』。所有不在『飛行』屬性或特性『飄浮』等情況下的地面寶可夢，將不會陷入異常狀態，並且受到『龍』屬性招式的傷害減半。若已經處於異常狀態則不會回復。此外，攜帶道具『薄霧種子』的寶可夢『特防』會提升1級（此效果即使寶可夢不在地面上也會發動）。
effect.en: Creates Misty Terrain for 5 turns. All grounded Pokémon (not Flying-type or possessing Levitate) are protected from status conditions, and damage taken from Dragon-type moves is halved. Existing status conditions are not cured. Pokémon holding a Misty Seed will have their Sp. Def raised by 1 stage (this effect triggers even if not grounded).

effect.zh: 有50%的機率讓對手的『特攻』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 100%的機率讓對手陷入『滿身糖狀態』。在3回合內，每回合結束時對手的『速度』會降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to cover the target in syrup. For 3 turns, the target's Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn.

effect.zh: 必定能先制攻擊（優先度:+1）。在1回合內連續攻擊2～5次。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +1). Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

effect.zh: 通常攻擊。
effect.en: Normal attack.

effect.zh: 在雙打對戰中，與『火之誓約』組合使用時，在4回合內招式的追加效果更容易出現；與『草之誓約』組合使用時，在4回合內對手的『速度』會降低。此外，威力會提升至150。此招式不受特性『引水』改變攻擊目標效果的影響。
effect.en: In Double Battles, if combined with Fire Pledge, it creates a rainbow that doubles the chance of secondary effects for 4 turns. If combined with Grass Pledge, it creates a swamp that lowers the opponents' Speed for 4 turns. The power becomes 150. This move ignores the Storm Drain ability's redirection effect.

effect.zh: 有20%的機率讓對手陷入1～4回合的『混亂』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target for 1 to 4 turns.

effect.zh: 將對手變成『水』屬性。
effect.en: Changes the target's type to Water.

effect.zh: 在1回合內連續攻擊2～5次。
effect.en: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

effect.zh: 在1回合內連續攻擊2～5次。
effect.en: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

effect.zh: 到自己的下個回合為止，若因為對手的攻擊而陷入『瀕死』狀態，則對手也會陷入『瀕死』狀態。對極巨化的對手無效。第7世代起，連續使用必定失敗。
effect.en: If the user faints from an opponent's attack before its next turn, the attacker faints as well. This has no effect on Dynamaxed opponents. From Gen 7 onwards, it always fails if used consecutively.

effect.zh: 當此招式的傷害會使對手的HP歸零時，對手將會保留1點HP。在捕捉野生寶可夢時非常方便。
effect.en: Leaves the target with at least 1 HP instead of fainting. Very useful for catching wild Pokémon.

effect.zh: 將對手特殊攻擊造成的傷害以2倍返還給對手。在『雙打對戰』時，只對最後受到的招式有效。必定後制攻擊（優先度:-5）。對『惡』屬性無效，但不受其他屬性相剋影響。
effect.en: Retaliates with double the damage taken from a special attack. In Double Battles, counters the last move hit by. Always goes last (Priority: -5). Ineffective against Dark-types, but ignores other type matchups.

effect.zh: 將自己的『屬性』變成與對手相同的『屬性』。若對手處於太晶化狀態，則會複製其太晶屬性；但若對手太晶化為『星晶』屬性，則會複製其原本的屬性。
effect.en: Changes the user's type to match the target's. If the target is Terastallized, it copies the Tera Type, except if the target is Tera Stellar, in which case it copies the original type.

effect.zh: 在2回合後進行攻擊。若目標已替換下場，則會攻擊處於相同位置的寶可夢。受屬性相剋影響。
effect.en: Attacks 2 turns after use. If the target is switched out, it attacks the Pokémon occupying the same position. Affected by type effectiveness.

effect.zh: 回復最大HP一半的血量。
effect.en: Restores the user's HP by half of its maximum HP.

effect.zh: 100%的機率讓在該回合內能力等級有提升的對手寶可夢陷入1～4回合的『混亂』狀態（通常需要後攻攻擊才能發動，但若對方上場時能力就提升也包含在內）。聲音類招式。會穿透對手的『替身』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to confuse a target that had its stat stages raised this turn for 1 to 4 turns (typically requires attacking after the target, but triggers if stats were raised upon switching in). Sound-based move. Bypasses the target's Substitute.

effect.zh: 減少自己最大HP的一半，取而代之讓自己的『攻擊』、『特攻』和『速度』各提升2級。
effect.en: The user cuts its maximum HP in half to sharply raise its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by 2 stages each.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手的『特攻』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 奪取對手持有且在對戰中有效的『樹果』，並供自己使用。
effect.en: Steals the target's held Berry and eats it, gaining its effect.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手的『特防』降低1級。聲音類招式。會穿透對手的『替身』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage. Sound-based move. Bypasses the target's Substitute.

effect.zh: 100%的機率讓對手的『特攻』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 將給予對手傷害的一半回復為自己的HP。
effect.en: Restores the user's HP by half the damage dealt to the target.

effect.zh: 讓自己的『特攻』和『特防』各提升1級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 通常攻擊。
effect.en: Normal attack.

effect.zh: 通常攻擊。當特性為『鐵拳』時，威力提升為1.2倍。
effect.en: Normal attack. Power is increased by 1.2x if the user has the Iron Fist ability.

effect.zh: 將給予對手傷害的一半回復為自己的HP。
effect.en: Restores the user's HP by half the damage dealt to the target.

effect.zh: 通常攻擊。
effect.en: Normal attack.

effect.zh: 這個招式的『屬性』會變成與自己的『第一屬性』相同。處於太晶化狀態時，會變成與太晶屬性相同的屬性。
effect.en: This move's type matches the user's primary type. If Terastallized, it matches the user's Tera Type.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓自己的『攻擊』提升1級。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 將該回合內最後受到招式傷害的1.5倍返還給對手。若沒有受到傷害則會失敗。不受屬性相剋影響。
effect.en: Retaliates with 1.5x the damage taken from the last move hit by that turn. Fails if no damage was taken. Ignores type matchups.

effect.zh: 攻擊時不受對手特性的影響。
effect.en: Attacks ignoring the target's ability.

effect.zh: 第1回合100%機率讓自己的『特攻』提升1級，並在第2回合進行攻擊。
effect.en: In the first turn, the user has a 100% chance to raise its Sp. Atk by 1 stage, and then attacks in the second turn.

effect.zh: 若對手與自己性別不同，會讓對手陷入『著迷』狀態。陷入『著迷』狀態後，對手有50%的機率無法對自己進行攻擊。若自己與對手性別相同，或其中一方為無性別，則招式失敗。
effect.en: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target becomes infatuated. Infatuated targets have a 50% chance of being unable to attack the user. Fails if they are the same gender or if either is genderless.

effect.zh: 有20%的機率讓對手畏縮。
effect.en: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己將不再具有『火』屬性。若自己沒有『火』屬性，則招式失敗。即使自己處於『冰凍』狀態也能使用，使用後會解除『冰凍』狀態。
effect.en: After attacking, the user loses its Fire type. Fails if the user is not a Fire-type. Can be used while frozen, thawing the user in the process.

effect.zh: 暫時能使用對手最後對自己使用的招式。PP為複製的招式在未使用PP提升劑時的最大值。替換後會恢復原狀。如果對手的招式是『模仿』、『揮指』、『鸚鵡學舌』、『變身』、『掙扎』、『寫生』、『夢話』、『自然之力』、『貓之手』、『搶先一步』、『仿效』、『喋喋不休』、『打嗝』、『慶祝』、『牽手』、『極巨炮』、『巨獸斬』、『巨獸彈』、『燃燒輪舞』、『暗黑輪舞』、『劇毒輪舞』、『格鬥輪舞』、『魔法輪舞』、『太晶星群』或極巨招式，則會失敗。
effect.en: Temporarily copies the last move the target used on the user. The PP becomes the copied move's base maximum PP. Reverts upon switching out. Fails if the target's move was Mimic, Metronome, Mirror Move, Transform, Struggle, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Nature Power, Assist, Me First, Copycat, Chatter, Belch, Celebrate, Hold Hands, Dynamax Cannon, Behemoth Blade, Behemoth Bash, any Axel moves, Tera Starstorm, or any Max Move.

effect.zh: 為對手的『屬性』追加『草』屬性。
effect.en: Adds the Grass type to the target's types.

effect.zh: 自己也會受到給予對手傷害1/2的損傷。
effect.en: The user takes 1/2 the damage dealt to the target in recoil.

effect.zh: 燒毀對手持有的『樹果』或『一般寶石』使其無法使用。
effect.en: Burns up the target's Berry or Normal Gem, making it unusable.

effect.zh: 如果上個回合自己使用的招式沒有命中或失敗，或者因為『麻痺』、『混亂』、『畏縮』等狀態而無法行動，威力會變成2倍。
effect.en: Power doubles if the user's previous move missed, failed, or if the user couldn't act due to paralysis, confusion, flinching, etc.

effect.zh: 使用後，每回合減少對手最大HP的1/8，並回復自己等量的HP。即使自己替換下場，效果也會繼承。對『草』屬性寶可夢無效。
effect.en: A seed is planted on the target. It steals 1/8 of the target's max HP every turn. It remains effective even if the user switches out. Does not affect Grass-type Pokémon.

effect.zh: 在5回合內將天氣變成『雪』（『冰』屬性寶可夢的『防禦』會提升為1.5倍）。
effect.en: Changes the weather to snow for 5 turns. Ice-type Pokémon have their Defense stat multiplied by 1.5.

effect.zh: 如果在該回合受到對手招式的傷害，威力會變成2倍。必定後制（優先度:-4）。
effect.en: Power doubles if the user is damaged by the target in the same turn. Always goes last (Priority: -4).

effect.zh: 從幾乎所有的招式中隨機使用1個。
effect.en: Waggles a finger and stimulates the brain into randomly using nearly any move.

effect.zh: 回復給予對手傷害的一半HP。只有在對手處於『睡眠』狀態時才會成功。
effect.en: Restores the user's HP by half the damage taken by the target. Fails if the target is not asleep.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手的『特防』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 有20%的機率讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 20% chance to paralyze the target.

effect.zh: 當場地處於『電氣場地』狀態，且對手不是『飛行』屬性或『飄浮』等特性而處於地面時，威力會變成2倍（如果自己也處於地面，會再加上場地的1.3倍效果）。
effect.en: Power doubles if the target is grounded in Electric Terrain. Terrain multipliers also apply if the user is grounded.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『防禦』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手的『特防』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 有50%的機率讓對手的『特防』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己的『特攻』100%降低2級。
effect.en: After attacking, the user's Sp. Atk drops by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 容易擊中要害（要害等級:+1）。
effect.en: Has a high critical-hit ratio.

effect.zh: 重新獲得自己最後使用過的攜帶物品。如果目前已攜帶物品則會失敗。
effect.en: Recovers the held item the user last consumed. Fails if the user is currently holding an item.

effect.zh: 在5回合內將對手物理攻擊的傷害減半。如果我方有多隻寶可夢，則傷害減為2/3而非一半。被擊中要害時無法減傷。替換寶可夢效果仍然持續。
effect.en: Halves damage from physical attacks for 5 turns. If there are multiple allies, damage is reduced to 2/3 instead of half. Does not affect critical hits. Effect remains even if the user switches out.

effect.zh: 攻擊後，自己的『特攻』100%降低2級。
effect.en: After attacking, the user's Sp. Atk drops by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 有30%的機率讓對手陷入『麻痺』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

effect.zh: 一般攻擊。
effect.en: Regular attack.

effect.zh: 將自己的『攻擊』和『速度』各提升1級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage each.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『特防』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 如果同回合有其他寶可夢也使用『輪唱』，將無視『速度』緊接在第一個使用者之後發動，且第二個以後的『輪唱』威力變為2倍。聲音招式。可穿透對手的『替身』狀態。（雙打對戰用）
effect.en: If other Pokémon use Round in the same turn, they will attack immediately after the first user regardless of Speed. Subsequent Rounds have double power. Sound-based move. Bypasses substitute.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『特防』降低2級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 如果由『肯泰羅（帕底亞的樣子）』使用，會根據自身型態變為『格鬥』、『火』或『水』屬性之一。不受對手的『反射壁』、『極光幕』效果影響，並會破壞對手的『反射壁』、『光牆』和『極光幕』。
effect.en: When used by Paldean Tauros, the move's type matches its form (Fighting, Fire, or Water). Bypasses and destroys Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『冰凍』狀態。特性為『鐵拳』時，威力提升為1.2倍。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target. Power is 1.2x with Iron Fist.

effect.zh: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入『冰凍』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手陷入『灼傷』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to burn the target.

effect.zh: 連續使用且每次命中時，威力會倍增（最大160）。如果攻擊未命中或未連續使用則會重置。
effect.en: Power doubles with each consecutive hit, up to 160. Power resets if the attack misses or is not used consecutively.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『速度』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 在下一回合，自己對該目標使用的招式必定會命中。
effect.en: Ensures the user's next move against the target will hit.

effect.zh: 將自己的『速度』提升2級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 在1回合內連續攻擊2～5次。
effect.en: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

effect.zh: 必定能先制（優先度:+3），在該回合內，自己和同伴不會受到對手或同伴使用的範圍招式影響。
effect.en: Always goes first (Priority: +3). Protects the user and its allies from moves that hit multiple targets for that turn.

effect.zh: 當場地處於『精神場地』狀態，且自己不是『飛行』屬性或『飄浮』等特性而處於地面時，威力會提升為1.5倍（加上場地的1.3倍效果），並改為攻擊對手全體（在雙打對戰中傷害會變成0.75倍）。
effect.en: If grounded in Psychic Terrain, power is increased by 1.5x (stacking with terrain boost) and damages all opponents. In Double Battles, the spread damage is 0.75x.

effect.zh: 100%機率讓對手的『攻擊』降低1級。
effect.en: Has a 100% chance to lower target's Attack by 1 stage.

effect.zh: 自身承受給予對手傷害1/4的反作用力傷害。
effect.en: User takes 1/4 recoil damage.

effect.zh: 將對手的『速度』降低2級。對『草』屬性或擁有『防塵』特性、攜帶道具『防塵護目鏡』的寶可夢無效。
effect.en: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages. Ineffective against Grass-types, Pokémon with Overcoat, or Pokémon holding Safety Goggles.

effect.zh: 在所有招式的PP歸零等無法使用其他招式時才能使用。自身承受最大HP1/4的反作用力傷害。無視『屬性』相剋造成傷害。
effect.en: Used when no other moves are available. User takes 1/4 maximum HP as recoil. Deals typeless damage.

effect.zh: 將自己的『特攻』提升2級。
effect.en: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

effect.zh: 有20%的機率讓對手陷入1～4回合的『混亂』狀態。
effect.en: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

effect.zh: 在5回合內，所有寶可夢的『防禦』和『特防』數值互換。再次使用會恢復原狀。
effect.en: Swaps the Defense and Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon for 5 turns. Using it again cancels the effect.
